ce_source_paths.reason: Runnable CE source runtime exposing health, boundary, module catalog, capability snapshot, and access self-test contracts without private handlers, store, SaaS, billing, or provider adapters.

Runnable CE worker source runtime exposing health, boundary, and deterministic queue/scheduler/backoff/circuit/canary self-tests without private scheduler dispatch, store, hosted runner callbacks, commercial adapters, or remediation orchestration.
Canonical URL/domain helpers; no customer data, provider credentials, store, SaaS, billing, or enterprise imports.
Typed API error envelopes shared by public clients and integrations.
Public module/page/capability catalog data and parser used by CE docs and UI composition.
Capability, edition, and action-gate kernel. Provider-specific entitlement mutation remains private.
Resource normalization and graph primitives used to merge code, cloud, container, runtime, and external surfaces.
SSRF-safe HTTP client primitives for community scanners and connectors.
Shared severity normalization helpers.
Version parsing helpers used by public vulnerability contracts.
Pure action/feature access decision kernel for CE-visible RBAC and sensitive-evidence gates; no store, provider, billing, SaaS, or enterprise imports.
Retry/backoff primitives for stable local scanners and CE-safe workers; standard-library only.
Scanner canary self-test primitives that let CE verify scanner regressions without proprietary data sources.
Circuit-breaker primitives for resilient connector/scanner execution; standard-library only.
Pure compliance scoring and evidence-binder rendering for CE reports; enterprise retention/orchestration remains private.
Pure score trend forecasting helpers used by report/dashboard summaries; no external ML dependency or provider coupling.
Freshness recorder primitives used to reason about stale findings and evidence without provider coupling.
Pure identity/OAuth risk scoring helpers with no store, connector, or tenant-provider dependency.
Evidence screenshot/image hashing helpers for deterministic CE evidence comparison.
Pure leak freshness and blast-radius scoring helpers; commercial darkweb collection and feeds remain private.
Request/trace id and structured logging helpers for CE observability.
Dependency-free basic PDF report renderer for CE report export; enterprise templates and orchestration remain private.
Bounded scan job queue primitive for CE-local worker execution.
Stable scheduling/staggering helpers for CE-safe periodic work.
Local envelope-encryption primitives for self-hosted CE secret storage; managed KMS adapters remain private.
Pure SLA budget and aging math used by CE findings/report workflows.
Small statistical helpers for score/report calculations; standard-library only.

merge_rule: Change private source first, rerun exporter, review generated delta.
